code:
import io
import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
mut line = ""
match line_opt
when Some(s)
  line = s
when None
  line = ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut sorted = true
mut has_prev = false
mut prev = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false

while i <= n
  mut b = 32
  if i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      b = v
    when None
      b = 32
    end
  end

  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13

  if is_ws
    if in_num
      let num = cur * sign
      if has_prev
        if num < prev
          sorted = false
        end
      end
      prev = num
      has_prev = true
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = false
    end
  else if b == 45
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if b == 43
    in_num = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
    in_num = true
  end

  i = i + 1
end

if sorted
  println("YES")
else
  println("NO")
end
